hero.badge: Mental care that feels calmer and closer
hero.headline: Start a care journey that fits you with confidence and clarity
hero.subtext: Find the right specialist, book your session easily, and track your steps in one place — from choosing to session and support when needed.
hero.ctaSecondary: Help me choose the right one

panel.guidedPathLabel: Choose how you want to start
panel.pathNotSure: I'm not sure where to start
panel.bookingPreviewHint: See specialist and time before confirming
panel.clearSteps: Clear steps from start to session

reassurance.eyebrow: A platform that helps you start care without confusion

choice.title: Clearer choice
choice.desc: Starting paths that fit your needs.

booking.title: Easier booking
booking.desc: See the time and price before confirming.

followUp.title: Calmer follow-up
followUp.desc: Sessions, chat, and support in one clear place.

startPaths.title: Choose the starting path that fits you best
startPaths.subtitle: Start from the path closest to your need — you can always change your choice later.

notSure.title: I'm not sure where to start
notSure.desc: Answer a few short questions and we'll help you understand the path closest to your need.

knowSpecialty.title: I know the specialty I need
knowSpecialty.desc: Explore available specialties and compare specialists easily.

chooseDirectly.title: I want to choose a specialist directly
chooseDirectly.desc: Browse specialist profiles and see experience and availability before booking.

practitionerJoin.title: I'm a specialist and want to join
practitionerJoin.desc: Apply to join the Fayed network and manage your sessions from one place.

guidedEntry.title: Choose the public entry path that fits you best
guidedEntry.subtitle: You do not need to figure out the whole product structure on your own. Start with the path that best matches how certain or uncertain you feel right now.

matching.title: Start with guided matching
matching.desc: Use guided matching after creating your patient account if you want help narrowing down the right type of practitioner before browsing profiles.

assessment.title: Understand your needs first
assessment.desc: Start with a short initial check-in after creating your patient account if you want more clarity before choosing a practitioner or next care step.

practitioners.title: Browse practitioners directly
practitioners.desc: Go straight to practitioner discovery if you already know you want to compare profiles, experience, and specialties.

support.title: Get help choosing
support.desc: If you are unsure where to begin, patient support is the calmer route once you sign in to your patient account.

howItWorks.title: How does your care start with Fayed?
howItWorks.subtitle: A clear journey from choosing a path to following your session.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Start with a specialty you know, or use guided matching if you are not sure where to begin.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose the right specialist and time, and know the price and payment steps before confirming.
howItWorks.step3Title: Follow your session and next step
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join the session at the right time, and use chat or support when available.

specialties.title: Choose the care path closest to you
specialties.subtitle: Explore available specialties and find a specialist that fits your need and preferred way of communication.

practitioners.title: Explore specialists with clear information to help you choose
practitioners.subtitle: Compare experience, specialty, and availability before booking your session.
practitioners.emptyNote: We are preparing specialist profiles to show you clear information to help you choose.

guidedCare.title: Let us help you find the right path
guidedCare.subtitle: Start with simple guidance that helps you understand your need and choose the closest path — without pressure or complex terminology.

bullets.bullet2: Does not provide a medical diagnosis.
bullets.bullet3: Helps you choose a suitable path.
bullets.bullet4: You can then explore specialists or request support.

visualStep.2: Understand the right path for you

bookingClarity.title: From booking to session… every step is clear
bookingClarity.subtitle: Before confirming your booking, you see the time and price. After payment, you see your session status and next step clearly.

beforeBooking.title: Before booking
beforeBooking.desc: Know the specialist, time, and price before proceeding.

afterPayment.title: After payment
afterPayment.desc: Track payment and session status without confusing messages.

sessionTime.title: Session time
sessionTime.desc: Know when you can join and what you need before starting.

ifProblem.title: When there is an issue
ifProblem.desc: Use support when payment fails, joining is difficult, or you have a question.

articles.eyebrow: Content that helps you make a clearer decision
articles.title: Content that helps you understand the next step
articles.subtitle: Short and clear articles that help you understand common questions before starting care.
articles.unavailableNote: You can continue exploring specialists for now.
articles.emptyNote: You can continue through specialties and specialist discovery.

academy.title: Interested in academic content and training?
academy.subtitle: Explore training and educational content aimed at specialists and those interested in care fields.

practitionerCTA.title: Are you a specialist and want to join Fayed?
practitionerCTA.subtitle: Join the Fayed network, showcase your expertise, and organize your schedule and sessions from one place.

helpPreview.title: Need help before you start?
helpPreview.subtitle: You can visit the help center to learn more about booking, sessions, payments, and cancellation policies.

finalCTA.title: Start with a clear step toward the right care for you
finalCTA.subtitle: Choose a specialist directly, or start with simple guided matching if you are not sure where to begin.
finalCTA.ctaSecondary: Help me choose the right one

whyFayed.title: Clearer care starts from a trusted platform
whyFayed.desc: Fayed does not just show you specialists — it helps you understand the next step, book your session, and follow it with clarity.
whyFayed.privacyDesc: Know the specialty, experience, and availability before deciding.
whyFayed.certifiedDesc: The price, time, and payment status are shown clearly at every step.
whyFayed.flexibleTitle: Sessions and chat with clear rules
whyFayed.flexibleDesc: Know when you can join the session and when chat is available.
whyFayed.arabicDesc: If you face an issue with booking, payment, or joining a session, you will find a clear support path.

signals.verifiedProfiles: Verified specialist profiles with clear specialty and availability context.
signals.publishedContent: Published public articles with clear context, not decorative snippets.
signals.secureJourney: A clear path from exploration to booking and secure session flow.

footer.tagline: Fayed is a care platform that helps you choose the right specialist, book your sessions, and follow your journey with clear steps.
footer.copyright: Fayed Mental Wellness. All rights reserved.
